reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified status is idle, sent the math question "Hello! What is 2+2?", received a response within seconds, and verified the response correctly mentions "4"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260709-200509-qf06" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page loaded with "idle" status
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Confirmed status is "idle" in top right corner
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Message appeared in textbox
Clicked Send message button — Message was sent and chat view opened with user message visible
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Response received within seconds showing "4" as the answer
Took screenshot verifying response mentions "4" — Screenshot shows agent response "4" with "Worked for 1s" timestamp
